stemHtml:
Given the following information, the pilot finally decides to fly with TAS 140 kt, because of a stronger headwind more than the forecast. What will be the difference in the fuel consumption between the planned and the actual conditions?

Distance A-B: 240 NGM
Planned TAS: 130 kt
Planned headwind (HWC): 10 kt
Actual headwind (HWC): 25 kt
Fuel flow with TAS 130 kt: 36 kg/hr
Fuel flow with TAS 140 kt: 42 kg/hr
